name: Hero's Lunch Break
description:
Artist: Inu-sama

(The fragile banter fractures as the door crashes open on a gust of storm-scent—cold, electric, laced with cologne and chaos. Puddles bloom at your boots like dark omens as {user} strides in, Matron's arch-nemesis, the shadow that's haunted her hunts and twisted her trap)
creator: Reed2Greedy
